title: ConvertKit vs HubSpot (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ConvertKit vs HubSpot: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between ConvertKit and HubSpot comes down to your specific use case. ConvertKit is built for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while HubSpot targets businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on creators, bloggers, and course sellers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ConvertKit wins for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while HubSpot is stronger for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or HubSpot?
faq.a: HubSpot starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from HubSpot to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
